creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
There several ways to fix build:
- Mark as CONFLICTS_BUILD = cunit
- Force-disable cunit in configure
- Add uve_ib.h to DISTFILES
- Wait for libdrm-2.4.84

Some of those are covered by portmgr blanket but without coordinating with the maintainer the fix can end up as cruft on the next update.
